subcodes.first_line: The verses have been sent down, the evidences have been made manifest, and the prison gates were opened in the numbered years even as foretold by the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات و ظهرت البینات و فتح باب السجن فی سنین معدودات کما اخبرنا مالک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
